nasb.text: But when His brothers had gone up to the feast, then He Himself also went up, not publicly, but as if, in secret.

esv.text: But after his brothers had gone up to the feast, then he also went up, not publicly but in private.

cnv.text: 然而，他的弟弟上去過節以後，他也上去過節，不是公開地去，卻是暗中地去。

ccb.text: 他们走了以后，耶稣避开了人们的注意，暗地里上去过节。

csbs.text: 不过当他的弟弟们上去过节以后，他也上去了，但没有公开，像是悄悄去的。
